name: grounded2
title: Framework 3 — grounded2 (grounded + contribution + explore/confirm + data augmentation + auto-introspection)
description: Extends grounded with an importance-maximizer (advisor subagent + frame & pivot-check gates) to counter the referee's modesty-ratchet, an explore->confirm discovery path, identification-first ranked design, mid-study data augmentation via per-dataset sealing, and a mandatory introspector that writes introspection.md at the end. source->audit->profile->frame->explore->design->literature->estimate->pivot->robustness->referee->write->reproduce->introspect.
